title: Neomammillaria moelleriana
taxonomy: Neomammillaria moelleriana is a species of cactus in the genus Mammillaria, which is now considered a subgenus of Mammillaria. The classification of Neomammillaria moelleriana is part of the family Cactaceae, and it is a type of flowering plant. The Mammillaria genus is a group of small to medium-sized cacti with rounded stems and short, fine spines. Within the Mammillaria genus, Neomammillaria moelleriana is typically classified as a species of cactus that produces white or pale yellow flowers. The classification of Neomammillaria moelleriana can vary depending on the source and current taxonomic understanding.

intro: Neomammillaria moelleriana, also known as the Moeller's pincushion cactus, is a species of flowering plant in the cactus family Cactaceae.
